Pr(A).description: Probability of cat ownership, used in the general rule of addition to compute Pr(A or B).

Pr(B).description: Probability of dog ownership, used in the general rule of addition to compute Pr(A or B).

Pr(A and B).description: Probability of joint cat and dog ownership, subtracted in the general rule of addition to avoid double-counting when computing Pr(A or B).
